new-tab-requested.title: New browser window
new-tab-requested.subtitle: To continue, we need to open a new browser window. Please tap the button below.

new-tab-processing.title: Liveness check pending
new-tab-processing.subtitle: We opened a new browser tab on this device. Please complete your liveness check in there.

liveness.title: Liveness check
liveness.subtitle: We need to verify that you're a real person.
liveness.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your mobile device and we'll use biometrics to verify it.

id-doc.title: Scan or upload your ID
id-doc.subtitle: We need to some more information about your identity.
id-doc.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your mobile device, so you can use it take a photo of your ID.

liveness-with-id-doc.title: Liveness check & ID document
liveness-with-id-doc.subtitle: We need to use your mobile device to verify that you're a real person and check an ID document.
liveness-with-id-doc.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your mobile device and we'll continue from there.

qr-code.instructions: Make sure the QR code is clearly visible on your device's screen. When authenticated, this page automatically updates.

sms.instructions: Alternatively, we can send you a link to your phone and you can continue from there.

qr-code-scanned.subtitle: QR code scanned. Please continue on your phone.

qr-code-sent.subtitle: Link sent to phone. Please continue from there.

confirm-continue-on-desktop.title: Other ways to continue
confirm-continue-on-desktop.subtitle: In case you don't have a smartphone, you can manually upload the documents we need from your computer for now and finish the rest of the validations later.
confirm-continue-on-desktop.warning: We highly recommend you to continue from your phone, if possible, since it will significantly expedite the identity verification process.
